title: cytisus capitatus subsp. ciliatus
intro: Cytisus capitatus subsp. ciliatus, also known as Cape Sweet-broom or Yellow Broom, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cytisus capitatus subsp. ciliatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, it is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used in capsules or powders.
